basic_details.job_title: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for PGT, TGT and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Various Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Post Graduate Teacher (PGT): Geography, History, Chemistry, Economics, Computer Science Trained Graduate Teacher (TGT): Hindi, English, Social Science, Sanskrit Special Educator: Special Educator ATL Instructor: ATL Instructor

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Application Submission Screening Test (if applicable) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Various Posts at PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur is 16th June 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How can I apply for the Various Posts at PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur. The application link and detailed instructions are provided in the "How to Apply" section of this article.

faq.question: Q3. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an application submission, followed by a screening test if applicable, and then an interview. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any vacancies for Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) or Trained Graduate Teacher (TGT) posts?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, there are 0 vacancies listed for PGT and TGT posts. However, it's always best to refer to the official notification for the most current information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the recruitment is scheduled for 04th June 2026. Candidates are encouraged to be prepared for this date.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is a graduate degree. However, specific qualifications vary by post, with some requiring post-graduate degrees. Detailed information is available on the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates should verify this in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to download the official notification PDF can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur?
faq.answer: The official website for PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Palampur is www.palampur.kvs.ac.in. You can visit this site for more information and updates.
